news.title: Geothermal startup Fervo catapults itself over the ‘valley of death’
news.summary: Fervo landed a large new loan with terms that strongly suggest the company's most turbulent days are behind it.

news.title: Meta rolls out new AI content enforcement systems while reducing reliance on third-party vendors
news.summary: Meta believes these AI systems can detect more violations with greater accuracy, better prevent scams, respond more quickly to real-world events, and reduce over-enforcement.

news.title: Google introduces a new way for users to sideload Android apps that still protects against scams
news.summary: Google is making Android sideloading easier with a new advanced setting that lets users disable app verification after a multistep security process.

news.title: DoorDash launches a new ‘Tasks’ app that pays couriers to submit videos to train AI
news.summary: Delivery couriers will be able to earn money by completing activities like filming everyday tasks or recording themselves speaking in another language.

news.title: Meta decides not to shut down Horizon Worlds on VR after all
news.summary: Horizon Worlds was once a cornerstone of Meta's plans to build a social metaverse -- four years later, the company almost shut it down.

news.title: A rogue AI led to a serious security incident at Meta
news.summary: For almost two hours last week, Meta employees had unauthorized access to company and user data thanks to an AI agent that gave an employee inaccurate technical advice, as previously reported by The Information. news.summary: Microsoft’s Xbox console strategy needs work, but its Bluetooth-ready controller that shipped alongside the Xbox Series X and Series S is fantastic. news.title: At the last minute, Meta decides not to kill Horizon Worlds VR after all
news.summary: VR will be on life support while mobile remains the focus, though.

news.title: FCC Enforcement Chief Offered to Help Brendan Carr Target Disney, Records Show
news.summary: Last year, as FCC chair Brendan Carr threatened ABC over a Jimmy Kimmel monologue, a civil servant overseeing West Coast stations privately pledged support, according to emails obtained by WIRED.

news.title: Meta Will Keep Horizon Worlds Alive in VR ‘for the Foreseeable Future’

news.title: A New Game Turns the H-1B Visa System Into a Surreal Simulation
news.summary: Inspired by real immigrant stories, H1B.Life captures the uncertainty, trade-offs, and pure luck that shape the lives of people trying to build a future in the US.
